intent: Single-screen GwG Paragraph-43 suspicious-activity report: reporter, category, incident date and free-form narrative plus two repeating groups (involved persons and transactions) and a sanctions-match result block.
notes: Tier-3 banking adversarial (PII-sensitive multi-row): two parallel three-row repeating groups force the harness to enumerate per-row coverage (first-row Required, rows 2-3 conditionally Required on the row's name field). The narrative is a long-form textarea explicitly carrying a 5000-character upper bound. Tipping-Off-Verbot is encoded as INFORMATIVE_LABEL only and the Sanktionslisten-Treffer as a RESULT_DISPLAY with a deliberate informativ-suffix to discourage the generator from claiming the match alone justifies any disposition. PII labels appear in node text for the redaction layer to exercise.
